response.justification: Bogdan has relevant experience in building complex systems and has worked with various technologies, including Node.js and TypeScript. He has also demonstrated technical leadership and has experience with experimentation and measurement platforms.
strengths: Proven experience in building complex systems
concerns: Limited direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems
No clear experience with enterprise-scale systems
Not directly familiar with all required technologies

key_factors.factor: Limited direct experience in AI-first growth systems
